overtimePolicy.pageSubtitle: Manage overtime rules and rates for all scopes
overtimePolicy.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to deactivate this policy?
overtimePolicy.confirmActivate: Are you sure you want to activate this policy?
overtimePolicy.confirmHardDelete: ⚠️ This will permanently delete the policy. This action cannot be undone.

notes.title: How Overtime Works
notes.priorityDesc2: In the case of an employee attending more than one branch on the same day, the overtime for the branch scope and department scope is ignored. Also, in case the employee is registered in more than one department, the priorities of the department are ignored.
notes.beforeShift: Before Shift OT is calculated from earlyArrivalMinutes
notes.afterShiftDay: After Shift Day OT applies when checkout is before nightShift.startTime
notes.afterShiftNight: After Shift Night OT applies when checkout falls within the night window
notes.weeklyOff: Weekend OT is for employees who attend on their weekly day off
notes.holiday: Holiday OT is for employees who attend on official holidays
notes.cap: Monthly cap: maximum overtime hours counted per month — any hours exceeding the cap are unpaid. When the cap is exceeded, each entry is reduced by the same ratio. Example: cap is 10 hours, employee worked 4 hours before shift and 16 hours after = 20 actual hours → each entry is paid at half: 2 hours before shift + 8 hours after shift
